title: BitCoal
description: This resource package, after renaming coal, will replace it with cryptocurrency. BitCoal was created on the basis of ordinary Bitcoin.
body:
This resource pack will make coal a fictional cryptocurrency. To do this, place the coal in the anvil and rename it like this: 

-  BitCoal

![BitCoal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd427a5b95bd1c7033aa1798442049f996a8d3b6.jpeg)

**Note: If the resource pack does not work, you will need to install CIT Resewn!**
